modules.one_liner: Local, zero token cost, node based engine for text to video and image to video plus audio, runs on your own hardware with no usage caps.

source.note: Repo and license are high confidence from training, not freshly fetched. Confirm both before public use.

routing.fallback_lane: cloud_gpu (RunPod or Vast, rented per hour) when local VRAM is short

models_supported.note: Model availability moves fast. These run inside ComfyUI as of the Jan 2026 knowledge cutoff. Verify the current best video model before locking a pipeline.

workflows.note: Fashion showcase reference-to-video (fisheye POV, glitch outfit transitions). Exported from the ComfyUI web UI as a graph; re-save via 'Save (API format)' before POSTing to /arsenal/comfyui/generate.

project_mappings.name: World Cup 2026 content operation
project_mappings.use: Cinematic b roll and motion pieces for OffsideMind essays, high energy clip beds for MatchdayMatrix. Zero cost per clip means you can mass produce through the July 19 run.

project_mappings.name: Sneakers Fest 2026
project_mappings.use: Lagos Noir hype reels, sneaker reveal motion, sponsor teaser clips for the December 12 build up.

project_mappings.name: Catalyst: The Awakening
project_mappings.use: Animated panels, Ase VFX motion, issue trailers. Pairs with AI4AnimationPy already in the Tech Stack.

project_mappings.name: UGC ads engine
project_mappings.use: Local zero cost alternative and complement to the Higgsfield lane. Keeps spend off the paid pipe for volume drafts.

hardware_reality.flag: Local video generation needs a strong GPU with high VRAM. This is the real gate, not the software.
hardware_reality.minimum_practical: Roughly 12 GB VRAM for lighter models, 24 GB or more for the heavier video models, exact need depends on model and resolution.
hardware_reality.vram_numbers_confidence: approximate, verify against the specific model you pick
options: Local GPU box if you have one in Lagos
Rented cloud GPU (RunPod, Vast) wired as the fallback lane, billed per hour
Hybrid: prototype workflows locally on a small model, batch the heavy renders on a rented GPU

law_alignment.efficiency_over_effort: Systemized generation, no manual render farm.
law_alignment.infinite_abundance: Zero marginal token cost per clip, volume is not gated by spend.
law_alignment.value_over_time: One workflow, reused across every project lane.

provenance.discovered_via: Uploaded reel, comment gated free open source local video generator

provenance.identity_confidence: medium. ComfyUI ecosystem is confirmed by the on screen GitHub footage. The specific timeline front end shown was not named on screen.
